description:
You are a Sustainability Specialist preparing a board presentation on global renewable energy. On Slide 3 ('Solar PV Capacity by Country') of the presentation located at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/renewable_energy_report.pptx, insert a table with 6 rows and 4 columns. Populate the table with the following IRENA Renewable Capacity Statistics 2023:

Header row: Country | Capacity (GW) | YoY Growth (%) | Global Share (%)
Data rows:
- China | 393 | 28.1 | 36.7
- United States | 113 | 23.6 | 10.6
- Japan | 79 | 4.8 | 7.4
- Germany | 67 | 11.4 | 6.2
- India | 63 | 27.2 | 5.9

Save the updated presentation to /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/renewable_energy_report.pptx.
